info.name: StarBottles API
info.description:
Complete API collection for StarBottles platform. Base URL: https://api.starbottles.in/api/v1

Setup:
1. Set the `base_url` variable to https://api.starbottles.in/api/v1
2. Login using POST /auth/login
3. Copy the token from the response and set it in the `token` collection variable
4. All authenticated requests will use Bearer {{token}} automatically

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@example.com",
  "phone": "9999999999",
  "company": "Test Company",
  "message": "Interested in your products",
  "product_id": null
}

request.description: Poll this endpoint while a sync is running to get real-time progress (status, stage, current, total).
